_comment: prompts.json — Default editable source for Asterisk audio prompt text.
This file is loaded automatically by generate_prompts.py when no
--input-file is supplied. Edit the 'text' field of any prompt and
re-run generate_prompts.py — only changed prompts will be regenerated.
Schema:
version    : integer, format version (currently 1)
defaults   : optional object; voice/model applied to all prompts
unless overridden per-entry
prompts[]  : list of prompt entries
Per-entry fields:
stem       : REQUIRED — filename stem (no extension); must match
what voice_agent.agi references
text       : REQUIRED — text sent to OpenAI TTS
language   : optional hint for documentation (not used by the tool)
version    : optional label for change tracking (not used by the tool)
enabled    : optional boolean; set false to skip a prompt (default true)
voice      : optional per-entry TTS voice override
model      : optional per-entry TTS model override
Caching:
The tool computes a SHA-256 hash of text+voice+model+sample_rate+channels.
A prompt is only regenerated when its hash changes or its files are missing.
Use 'python generate_prompts.py --force' to bypass the cache entirely.

prompts.text: Please tell me your issue now.
